title: Linux web host reconnaissance (methodical)
description: A first-pass checklist for structured observation before exploitation.

items.text: Confirm user context: uid/gid, groups, shell behavior.
Record hostname, kernel, and distro clues for known vuln classes.
Inventory SUID/SGID and capabilities with quiet error handling.
Check cron, timers, and writable paths that affect boot or service startup.
Map running services to config locations and log channels.
Build a timeline hypothesis before grepping logs blindly.
